ValidationRule.description: Rule to check Renewal Required fields is selected when stage is either Closed Won or Stage 7
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_8030_Bypass_OwnedByCompany_V_RULE ) ,IF( AND( fxRecordTypeDevName__c = 'Informatics' ,OR( TEXT(StageName)='Stage 7 - Submit Order' ,TEXT(StageName)='Closed Won' ) ,TEXT(Renewal_Required_INF__c)='' ) ,TRUE ,FALSE ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_030: The field Renewal Required is mandatory for the current stage.
